title: Bee-Nuke
description: Turns bees into proximity entity fork bombs which rapidly replicate upon close contact, potentially melting your pc (crashing game)
body:
"Bee-Nuke" is a unique Minecraft data pack that takes the concept of bees to a whole new level. Upon installation, bees in the game become proximity-triggered self-replicating entity forks, which can rapidly multiply when approached by a player. Close contact trigger an explosion of entities that can overwhelm a player's computer, potentially causing it to melt due to the excessive strain. 
"Bee-Nuke" adds a challenging and risky element to Minecraft gameplay, as players must navigate cautiously around the once-friendly bees to avoid their overwhelming replication and potential meltdown.
